gov.nist.javax.sip
インタフェース SIPConstants

すべてのスーパーインタフェース:
ParameterNames, SIPHeaderNames
public interface SIPConstants
extends SIPHeaderNames, ParameterNames, ParameterNames

Default constants for SIP.

バージョン:
JAIN-SIP-1.1 $Revision: 1.4 $ $Date: 2004/01/22 13:26:28 $

フィールドの概要
static java.lang.String BRANCH_MAGIC_COOKIE
          Prefix for the branch parameter that identifies BIS 09 compatible branch strings.
static int DEFAULT_PORT
           
static java.lang.String SIP_VERSION_STRING
          constant SIP_VERSION_STRING
 
インタフェース gov.nist.javax.sip.header.SIPHeaderNames から継承されたフィールド
ACCEPT, ACCEPT_ENCODING, ACCEPT_LANGUAGE, ALERT_INFO, ALLOW, ALLOW_EVENTS, AUTHENTICATION_INFO, AUTHORIZATION, CALL_ID, CALL_INFO, CONTACT, CONTENT_DISPOSITION, CONTENT_ENCODING, CONTENT_LANGUAGE, CONTENT_LENGTH, CONTENT_TYPE, CSEQ, DATE, ERROR_INFO, EVENT, EXPIRES, FROM, IN_REPLY_TO, MAX_FORWARDS, MIME_VERSION, MIN_EXPIRES, ORGANIZATION, PRIORITY, PROXY_AUTHENTICATE, PROXY_AUTHORIZATION, PROXY_REQUIRE, RACK, REASON, RECORD_ROUTE, REPLY_TO, REQUIRE, RETRY_AFTER, ROUTE, RSEQ, SERVER, SUBJECT, SUBSCRIPTION_STATE, SUPPORTED, TIMESTAMP, TO, UNSUPPORTED, USER_AGENT, VIA, WARNING, WWW_AUTHENTICATE
 
インタフェース gov.nist.javax.sip.address.ParameterNames から継承されたフィールド
ISUB, PHONE_CONTEXT_TAG, POSTDIAL, PROVIDER_TAG, SIP_URI_SCHEME, SIPS_URI_SCHEME, TCP, TEL_URI_SCHEME, UDP
 
インタフェース gov.nist.javax.sip.header.ParameterNames から継承されたフィールド
ACTION, ALERT, ALGORITHM, BRANCH, CARD, CAUSE, CNONCE, COOKIE, DIGEST, DOMAIN, DURATION, EMERGENCY, EXPIRES, HANDLING, HIDDEN, ICON, ID, INFO, MADDR, NC, NEXT_NONCE, NON_URGENT, NONCE, NONCE_COUNT, NORMAL, OPAQUE, OPTIONAL, PASSWORD, PROXY, PUBKEY, PURPOSE, Q, QOP, REALM, RECEIVED, REDIRECT, RENDER, REQUIRED, RESPONSE, RESPONSE_AUTH, SESSION, SIGNATURE, SIGNED_BY, STALE, TAG, TEXT, TRANSPORT, TTL, URGENT, URI, USERNAME, VERSION
 

フィールドの詳細

DEFAULT_PORT

static final int DEFAULT_PORT
関連項目:
定数フィールド値

BRANCH_MAGIC_COOKIE

static final java.lang.String BRANCH_MAGIC_COOKIE
Prefix for the branch parameter that identifies BIS 09 compatible branch strings. This indicates that the branch may be as a global identifier for identifying transactions.

関連項目:
定数フィールド値

SIP_VERSION_STRING

static final java.lang.String SIP_VERSION_STRING
constant SIP_VERSION_STRING

関連項目:
定数フィールド値
